case_title: MICHAEL AVIDAN ET AL VS. BUSINESS ALLIANCE INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, AMENDING CLAIM TO ADD AN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVIDAN, MICHAEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-21-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-21-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFFS MICHAEL AVIDAN AND YAEL AVIDAN ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT BUSINESS ALLIANCE INSURANCE COMPANY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RICHARD MO, CLAIMS MANAGER. DEFENDANT BARAK BEN-SHAUL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BARAK BEN-SHAUL WAIVES HIS RIGHT TO TIMELY SERVICE AND CHOOSES TO PROCEED WITH HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
